(1) These rules may be cailed the Railway Claims Tribunal (Procedure) Amendment Rules, 2006. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 409 GI/2006 : a) -- 1 of 2 -- 2.1 column 3 “Dig Foot Note the Railway Claims Tribunal (Procedure) Rules 1989, in the Schedule [ at serial numiber 12, for the entry, in sfthe folowing entry shall be substituted, namely -~- tricts of Agra, Bulandshahar, Moradabad, Bijnore, Mathura, Ghaziabad, Meerut, Aligath, Saharanpur, Jyoitiba Phule Nagar (Amroha), Bagpat, Etah, Firozabad, Gautam Budh Nagar (Noida), Mahaj Maya Nagar (Hathras), Muzaffar agar, Rampur, Pilibhit and Mainpuri of the State of Uttar Peadesh and Districts of Haridwar and of Uttranchal. ” ' [F.No, bsromcrys- Part 11] B.
